query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  s.provider,
  s.status
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE (
  s.planName LIKE '%Collaboration%' 
  OR s.planName LIKE '%Manage Voice%'
  OR s.planName LIKE '%Managed Voice%'
)
AND s.status = 'active'
ORDER BY s.planName, s.customerExternalId;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  s.provider,
  s.status
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE (
  s.planName LIKE '%Collaboration%' 
  OR s.planName LIKE '%Manage Voice%'
  OR s.planName LIKE '%Managed Voice%'
)
AND s.status = 'active'
ORDER BY s.planName, s.customerExternalId;
